notes: Vertex stage now binds the group(2) poly_data_tex/sampler, fetches per-polygon texels via textureLoad, and replaces position.y by floor/ceiling/media height from the data texture, selected by the SURFACE_FLOOR/CEILING/MEDIA discriminator (matches mesh.rs constants). polygon_index forwarded through VertexOutput for box 3.2. Added naga 24 (non-wasm dev-dep, wgsl-in) and a headless shader-compile test shader_wgsl_compiles_and_validates (naga parse + full Validator) in the web test suite. 29 lib + 9 integration tests pass; wasm32 cargo check green.
